metadata.name: Handle the Death of an Employee

description: HR has been notified that an active employee has passed away.

nodes.task_description: Verify the information and express condolences to the family.

expected_outcome.value: The HRBP confirms the sad news and speaks with the family.

nodes.task_description: Work with the family and the company's life insurance provider to process the claim.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP facilitates the life insurance claim process.

nodes.task_description: Process the final paycheck and coordinate the return of company property with the employee's family.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP sensitively handles all final administrative tasks related to the employee's separation.
